def: A charge for exceeding the monthly data cap on a mobile phone or internet plan. These fees can escalate quickly with streaming or large downloads.
avoid: Monitor data usage through provider apps; set data alerts and caps on your device; switch to an unlimited plan if you consistently exceed your limit.

def: A markup added by car dealers for preparing a vehicle for sale, including cleaning, inspection, and paperwork. Largely a profit center with no real cost basis.
avoid: Challenge dealer prep fees as pure profit; negotiate the total price of the car and refuse to pay separate prep fees.

def: A charge for transporting goods or services to your location, commonly added to furniture, appliance, online orders, and large-item purchases.
avoid: Look for free delivery promotions; bundle multiple items into one delivery to reduce per-item costs.

def: A fixed charge for evaluating a problem, common with auto repair, HVAC, plumbing, and electronics services. Often applied even if you decline the repair.
avoid: Ask if the diagnostic fee is waived if you approve the repair; shop around for free diagnostic offers.

def: A fee for removing and discarding old items, equipment, or materials after a service or installation.
avoid: Dispose of old items yourself at a recycling center to avoid disposal fees.
